question: A circuit has continuity when…
choices: There is a complete unbroken path|The wire is copper|The breaker is big
answer: There is a complete unbroken path

question: Voltage drop is reduced by…
choices: A larger conductor or shorter run|A bigger breaker|More connections
answer: A larger conductor or shorter run
why: Drop grows with length, shrinks with conductor size

question: GFCI protection is required…
choices: In damp and wet locations|Only in bedrooms|Only above 240 V
why: Anywhere water and people meet the circuit

question: Demand factors exist because…
choices: Not all loads run at once|Wire is expensive|Breakers are slow
answer: Not all loads run at once
why: Sizing for realistic peak demand, not the sum of every nameplate

question: A 20 A breaker with 25 A of load will…
choices: Trip on overload|Run forever|Boost the voltage
why: Sustained current above rating opens the breaker
